    authenticateUser(String, String) - Static method in class org.novastack.iposca.user.User
    Authenticates the user by getting the user record from the database, then verifying the user's existence.
    AuthenticationException - Exception Class in org.novastack.iposca.exceptions
    An exception class for authentication-related errors such as invalid credentials, existence of user or role changes.
